field_of_view_deg: 85.1-38.7 horizontal per imager; up to 360 combined
features: Four independent 5MP imagers with motorized zoom/focus on a single IP address
Integrated 360 surround IR up to 30 m
Up to 360 coverage (imagers adjustable on 4 axes)
Bosch Intelligent Video Analytics + Camera Trainer
microSD recording up to 2 TB with 5s pre-alarm buffer
release_notes: The NetCamCenter NDM-7703-AL (Bosch FLEXIDOME multi 7000i IR OEM) is a 20MP outdoor multi-imager panoramic dome pairing four independently aimable 5MP imagers and motorized zoom/focus lenses on one IP address with 360 surround IR to 30 m, 30 fps H.265, 120 dB HDR, two-way audio and onboard Intelligent Video Analytics.

frigate.notes: Bosch OEM (FLEXIDOME multi 7000i) multi-imager — each of the 4 imagers exposes its own stream. Use ONVIF auto-discovery to enumerate the imager streams.

home_assistant.notes: Bosch is ONVIF-conformant; add each of the 4 imagers via the ONVIF integration.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch OEM — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; add each imager as a separate camera.
